entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningProject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningProject identity="Chekurthi SriRamReddy"> <ExpansionItems> <ExpansionItem application="ActiveDirectory" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="sAMAccountName" nativeIdentity="CN=Chekurthi SriRamReddy,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" operation="Set" sourceInfo="ActiveDirectory" value="SriRamReddyChekurthi"/> </ExpansionItems> <MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" op="Create"/> </ProvisioningPlan> </MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="ActiveDirectory" trackingId="a613c8c84dff472c9f7815bcd90ed1a0"> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=Chekurthi SriRamReddy,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Set" value="SriRamReddyChekurthi"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> </ProvisioningProject>
